content.query:
-- View for SCL_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard Report v20220802
--
-- DROP VIEW dbo.SCL_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard
--

CREATE VIEW dbo.SCL_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard AS 
SELECT 
  'Company L' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC.Category as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 
  SCL.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer 
WHERE 
  SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX') 
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) BETWEEN DATEADD(
    MM, 
    DATEDIFF(
      MM, 
      0, 
      CAST(
        GETDATE() AS Date
      )
    ), 
    0
  ) 
  AND DATEADD(
    DD, 
    -1, 
    DATEADD(
      MM, 
      DATEDIFF(
        MM, 
        0, 
        CAST(
          GETDATE() AS Date
        )
      ) + 1, 
      0
    )
  ) 
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty >= 0 
  AND AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND AC.Category <> 'GWT' 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'
